title: DMF/DIXF: import-ready entity with staging behaviour (validateWrite + staging hook)
instruction: In the sandbox model, build an import-ready DMF slice. Ground it first with get_knowledge(topic="data-management-framework"). Create: (1) a table DemoImportTarget (label @TaxTransactionInquiry:HeaderNote, table group Main) with fields DocumentCode (String, EDT Num, mandatory), Description (String, EDT Name) and Amount (EDT AmountCur), plus a unique alternate-key index ImportTargetIdx on DocumentCode; (2) a data entity DemoImportTargetEntity over that table with public field names, DocumentCode as the entity key, EntityCategory=Master and DataManagementEnabled=Yes so DMF generates the staging table; on the entity, override `public boolean validateWrite()` to reject a non-positive Amount with a labelled error, and implement the staging hook DMF calls after the staging load (confirm its exact name and signature with get_knowledge/search before writing it - do not guess) so it normalises DocumentCode to upper case. Both objects must build with zero BP errors.
